acholi.no_major_event_routine_fieldwork_stead: Pe tye gin madit. Fieldwork ma pol, dongo ma cung.
acholi.the_watershed_is_healing_across_the_bo: Watershed tye ka cang i kabedo ducu. Headwaters gin ngic dok leng. Mainstem tero rec doki. Beaver wetlands tye ka tiyo tic pa floodplain. Man aye kit ma watershed-scale recovery nen kwede ka timing ki community guribbe kacel.
acholi.most_components_are_improving_a_few_st: Components mapol gitye ka dongo. Manok pud gimito tic. Trajectory ber dok community tye ka donyo iye.
acholi.some_wins_some_gaps_real_watershed_wor: Loyo mogo, bal mogo. Tic pa watershed me ada pe nwang acel; jami mogo odongo ka mogo ocung.
acholi.average_quality_is_low_and_few_compone: Quality me dyere piny dok components manok aye guo recovery thresholds. Man aye kit ma watersheds balle kwede mot ka stewardship pe romo ki pressures.
acholi.initial_conditions_look_workable_use_y: Initial conditions nen calo gitwero tic. Tii ki Year 1 pi citizen-science monitoring ki pwony me gero community support ma peya iti ki tic ma lubang calo dam removal.
acholi.what_you_can_do_for_this_component: 🛠 Ngo ma itwero timo pi component man
acholi.component_quality_across_the_10_year_c: 📈 Component quality i kom campaign me mwaka 10
acholi.year_by_year_quality_trend_chart_by_wa: Chart me quality trend mwaka ki mwaka pi watershed component
acholi.ai_watershed_educator_is_reading_your_: ⏳ AI watershed educator tye ka kwano watershed data ni...
acholi.it_is_not_a_wabanaki_person_not_a_real: Pe en dano me Wabanaki, pe watershed coordinator onyo hydrologist me ada, dok pe loko pi Wabanaki nation, agency, onyo organization mo keken.
acholi.for_authoritative_voices_on_maine_wate: Pi dwan ma gigenne i kom tic pa Maine watershed, peny Penobscot Nation Cultural and Historic Preservation Department, Wabanaki Public Health and Wellness, Atlantic Salmon Federation, Maine Coast Heritage Trust, Maine Audubon, Maine Soil and Water Conservation Districts, ki Maine Department of Environmental Protection.
acholi.watershed_steward_10_year_maine_campai: Watershed Steward: Maine campaign me mwaka 10
acholi.six_watershed_components_ten_years_rea: Watershed components abicel, mwaka apar, pressures me ada pa Maine: dam barriers, agricultural runoff, suburban stormwater, floods ki droughts ma climate kelo.
acholi.hydrological_feedback_rules_tie_them_t: Hydrological feedback rules aye guribo gi kacel.
acholi.healthy_buffers_cool_headwater_streams: Buffers ma yot ngico headwater streams. Beaver wetlands dwoko piny floods dok gilwoko mainstem. Ag runoff manok weko kulo yweyo. Kulo ma guribbe dok tye ki tipo dwoko salmon ki alewife runs.
acholi.what_if_you_had_done_nothing_for_10_ye: ↔ Ce onongo pe itimo gin mo pi mwaka 10 nining?
acholi.hydrological_feedback_rules_this_year: 🔄 Hydrological feedback rules me mwaka man
acholi.what_changed_this_year: Ngo ma oloke i mwaka man
acholi.ask_ai_watershed_educator_to_read_your: Peny AI watershed educator me kwano watershed data ni
acholi.ai_watershed_science_educator_reads_yo: AI watershed-science educator kwano state ni me kombedi
acholi.no_actions_yet_this_year_pick_a_compon: Pud pe tye action mwaka man. Yer component, yer technique.
acholi.insufficient_condensation_too_warm_or_: Condensation pe rom — lyeto twatwal onyo two twatwal.
acholi.slow_condensation_steady_but_gentle_pr: Condensation mot. Precipitation ma cung ento yot.
acholi.high_moisture_cool_temp_strong_lift_he: Moisture malo + temp ngic + lift matek → convective precipitation matek.
acholi.adjust_cloud_moisture_temperature_and_: Loko cloud moisture, temperature, ki yamo. Widget poko precipitation i kin types angwen ma pat pat. Pe score, pe reveal — kwe dok nen.
acholi.hypothesis_free_text_what_triggers_a_s: Hypothesis (free text): Ngo ma kelo storm ka pat ki drizzle?
acholi.hold_two_sliders_steady_move_one_watch: Mak sliders aryo mot. Kob acel. Nen.
acholi.find_two_settings_producing_the_same_t: Nong settings aryo ma kelo type marom.
acholi.real_storms_need_both_moisture_and_ins: Storms me ada mito moisture ki instability kacel. Nong ngec.
acholi.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Aniang — tit ki lok ni kikom
acholi.explain_how_moisture_temperature_and_w: Tit kit ma moisture, temperature, ki yamo guketo precipitation type kacel.
acholi.design_note_discrete_4_type_precipitat: Design note: discrete 4-type precipitation marker; pe rainfall-rate score; pe reveal — by design.
acholi.water_cycle_keyboard_shortcuts_1_throu: Water Cycle. Keyboard shortcuts: 1 o 6 yero stage, J loko Journey mode, R U P yero journey path ni.
acholi.switch_to_watershed_steward_10_year_ca: Lokke i Watershed Steward campaign me mwaka 10
acholi.ride_one_droplet_from_the_ocean_back_t: wot ki droplet acel ki i nam dok i nam. Ibicako i nam, evaporate, cit i cloud, poti calo kot, ka iyer path i ngom (river runoff, underground infiltration, onyo yat mwonyo). Path ki path tero kare mapat. Tyek loop me log journey; loops 3 yabo Journey badge.
acholi.you_rode_the_same_water_molecule_the_w: Iwoto ki water molecule ACEL nge ducu — oloko form (liquid → vapor → liquid) ento pe gicweyo onyo gityeko. Droplet ducu ma imato tye ka cycle pi mwaka mapol tara.
acholi.become_a_water_droplet_and_travel_thro: Dok water droplet ka iwot i water cycle ducu! Yer i stage ki stage dok pwony science ma tye i cok transformation acel-acel.
acholi.ask_a_question_e_g_why_do_clouds_float: Peny lapeny (labolle, Pingo clouds gikwang malo?)...
acholi.water_is_conserved_runoff_what_soaks_i: 💧 Pii kigwoko — runoff + ngo ma mwony i te ≈ 100% me kot ma o i ngom. Pe tye ma rwenyo; en tero paths mapat pat dok i nam.
